title: Create: Do it
description: The modpack where you can just... do it...
body:
# Create: Do It – A Lightweight, Ready-to-Play Modpack

Create: Do It is a minimalist, yet feature-rich modpack designed for players who want a ready-to-use experience without unnecessary bloat. No need to spend hours configuring settings—just launch and play!
✨ Key Features:

### 🔧 Create & Addons – Build incredible contraptions with Create and expand your possibilities with Create: Steam & Rails.

### 🌿 Naturalist – Enhance your world with realistic wildlife, adding immersive ecosystems and vibrant biomes.

### 🪑 Another Furniture – Decorate your world with detailed, functional furniture for a cozy touch.

### ✈️ Immersive Aircraft – Take to the skies with flyable planes, adding new exploration opportunities.

### ⚙️ QoL Improvements – A carefully curated selection of mods that improve gameplay without unnecessary complexity.

Whether you're a Create Mod enthusiast or just looking for a smooth and polished survival experience, Create: Do It delivers a streamlined, yet engaging adventure. No fluff—just fun.
